constraints.text: Graph mutation remains blocked; reviewed proposal outputs cannot execute graph or event mutations.
Reviewed proposal output cannot perform destructive apply or release side effects without a separate approval path.

decisions.text: v1.1 introduces a reviewed proposal layer with deterministic schemas instead of direct apply behavior.
Reviewed apply remains gated and non-executing even when proposal validation succeeds.

requirements.text: The reviewed proposal baseline must validate a proposal schema, template set, and adapter report before release readiness.
The v1.1.0 release path must include hardening evidence for identity, policy, and reviewed proposal invariants.

summary: v1.1 added the reviewed proposal baseline: proposal schema, adapter report, reviewed apply gating, graph mutation blocked, and release hardening through the v1.1.0 tag and release completion criteria.
